description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronized, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up environment variables for a build, then run a single ubuntu-latest job in a container using the kdeneon/plasma:user image. In this job, prepare the source code using a custom checkout action, install dependencies with a bash script, and perform the build with another bash script.
